mission.name: Bible in 365 Days — Episode Factory
mission.objective: Turn one creator command into a quality-controlled Bible episode upload package.
successCriteria: Every stage receives the accepted upstream artifact
Every executor produces an inspectable output contract
QC accepts the complete production manifest
No external upload occurs without a creator action

nextRecommendedAction.label: Create Episode
nextRecommendedAction.reason: One command starts the frozen CEO-to-upload production workflow.

healthSignals.summary: The frozen production pipeline is ready. No external AI, media, or publishing action runs in deterministic demo mode.

tasks.title: Plan and route the episode
tasks.routingReason: CEO Brain owns the frozen workflow and chooses the next executor from the approved critical path.

tasks.title: Research the assigned passage
tasks.routingReason: Research is a bounded synthesis task with a clear evidence contract.

tasks.title: Write the episode script
tasks.routingReason: The script agent turns accepted research into the production narrative.

tasks.title: Create the devotional reflection
tasks.routingReason: A focused devotional agent converts the script theme into reflection and application.

tasks.title: Prepare the voice production manifest
tasks.routingReason: The demo adapter produces an inspectable voice contract without claiming external audio rendering.

tasks.title: Design the visual plan
tasks.routingReason: The visual director maps the narration to scenes and continuity rules.

tasks.title: Prepare the thumbnail specification
tasks.routingReason: The demo adapter produces a deterministic creative specification for a future image tool.

tasks.title: Create the YouTube SEO package
tasks.routingReason: SEO metadata is a reversible text artifact derived from the accepted episode narrative.

tasks.title: Run production quality control
tasks.routingReason: QC validates every required artifact contract before packaging.

tasks.title: Assemble the upload package
tasks.routingReason: The packager performs a deterministic local handoff and never publishes externally.

recentActivity.message: The frozen ten-stage episode workflow is ready for one-command execution.

decisions.rationale: Only the CEO-to-upload workflow and its live interface help prove the winning story.
decisions.effect: All unrelated features remain outside Sprint 1 and Sprint 2.

orchestration.providerStatus: OpenAI adapter deferred until a key is added

stages.label: CEO
stages.purpose: Translate the creator command into the frozen execution plan.

artifact.name: Episode execution plan
artifact.summary: Ordered stages, owners, dependencies, and acceptance rules.

stages.label: Research
stages.purpose: Ground the episode in an inspectable passage research contract.

artifact.name: Passage research notes
artifact.summary: Context, themes, cross-references, and source boundaries.

stages.label: Script
stages.purpose: Turn accepted research into a production-ready narrative.

stages.label: Devotional
stages.purpose: Create reflection and practical application from the episode theme.

artifact.name: Devotional reflection
artifact.summary: Reflection, application, and closing prayer prompt.

stages.label: Voice
stages.purpose: Produce the voiceover contract for a future text-to-speech adapter.

artifact.name: Voice production manifest
artifact.summary: Voice profile, pacing, pronunciation, and segment timing.

stages.label: Visual
stages.purpose: Map the approved narration to a coherent visual sequence.

artifact.name: Visual scene plan
artifact.summary: Scene list, shot intent, continuity, and visual guardrails.

stages.label: Thumbnail
stages.purpose: Create a deterministic thumbnail specification for a future image adapter.

artifact.name: Thumbnail specification
artifact.summary: Composition, focal point, palette, and text-free fallback.

stages.label: SEO
stages.purpose: Package discoverable YouTube metadata from accepted content.

artifact.name: YouTube metadata
artifact.summary: Title, description, chapters, keywords, and pinned-comment draft.

stages.label: QC
stages.purpose: Validate required outputs and reject an incomplete production manifest.

artifact.name: Quality-control report
artifact.summary: Contract coverage, continuity checks, and release decision.

stages.label: Upload Package
stages.purpose: Assemble the accepted artifacts into a creator-controlled upload handoff.

artifact.name: YouTube upload package
artifact.summary: Complete artifact manifest marked Ready for YouTube.
